title: neltuma palmeri
intro: Neltuma palmeri, also known as the Palmer's neltuma, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Central and South America, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neltuma palmeri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Neltuma palmeri typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and seeds, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin and wound care.
